summary: Validated requested static scope for ESLint/TypeScript/Supabase P0 booking migration and build export. Static checks passed, but live frontend/backend runtime remains unavailable in this container, blocking end-to-end UI/API verification.

critical.issue: Supervisor is configured for /app/frontend and /app/backend, but these paths do not exist in this repo structure; runtime services fail to start, blocking live API/RPC tests.

minor.issue: Test block queries information_schema.columns with table_name='get_public_busy_slots' (function, not table), so public slot exposure assertion is effectively weak/non-enforcing.

ui_bugs.issue: UI smoke test to http://localhost:3000 failed with ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED; screenshot is blank white page.

integration_issues.issue: Could not execute runtime integration for create/reschedule/cancel because frontend and backend supervisors fail to chdir and do not bind.

action_items: Fix supervisor/service boot path mismatch so runtime endpoints are reachable for real e2e validation.
After runtime is restored, run authenticated multi-role booking flows against real Supabase and validate conflict handling at UI level.
Strengthen transactional_booking_p0.sql assertion for get_public_busy_slots schema/output contract (function output columns), not information_schema table lookup.
critical_code_review_comments: Requested P0 creation path is correctly using supabase.rpc('create_appointment') in booking/admin/barber flows reviewed; no direct appointments INSERT found in scanned app/components/hooks.
Migration 20260716057000 includes duration snapshot trigger, exclusion constraint against overlap, and authenticated INSERT revocation, which aligns with transactional anti-overbooking intent.

Admin and Barber reschedule/status flows still perform direct appointments UPDATE from frontend; although outside 'creation' scope, this should be reviewed with RLS/RPC policy expectations for consistency and hardening.

success_rate.frontend: 100% lint+ts+build checks for requested files / 0% live runtime

test_credentials: Read /app/memory/test_credentials.md successfully; no live auth flow executed due runtime unavailability.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested static validations passed (ESLint target files, tsc noEmit, Supabase static pytest, web export). Next agent should prioritize restoring runtime process boot and then execute live P0 booking e2e and API/RPC verification.
rca of the issue: Root cause of blocked live testing is infra/process mismatch: supervisor tries to chdir into /app/frontend and /app/backend (nonexistent in this repo), causing service spawn failure and repeated ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED during browser automation.
